log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Goblin — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:17+3=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:1+9=10 vs AC 15] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 20 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 47/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:1+9=10 vs AC 15] MISS.

=== ROUND 3 ===

ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Goblin — Unarmored Caster.

Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Goblin — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 37 damage. Goblin — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
